title: Brevo vs Flodesk (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Brevo and Flodesk email marketing tools. Brevo offers CRM and multi-channel features, while Flodesk excels in design. Find the best fit.
h1: Brevo vs Flodesk: Detailed Comparison for Email Marketing
intro: Brevo and Flodesk serve different segments of the email marketing market. Brevo is an all-in-one CRM platform with extensive multi-channel capabilities, while Flodesk focuses on stunning visual design and unlimited subscribers. Your choice depends on whether you prioritize feature breadth, pricing flexibility, or design-first functionality.

comparison_table.tool_a: CRM, SMS, WhatsApp, transactional email, live chat
comparison_table.tool_b: Beautiful templates, design tools, checkout forms, link in bio

choose_a_if: You need a comprehensive CRM with multi-channel marketing (SMS, WhatsApp, live chat)
You want a free tier with up to 100,000 subscribers or need transactional email APIs
You're focused on B2B marketing, automation workflows, and customer relationship management
choose_b_if: Design and visual aesthetics are your top priority for email campaigns
You need unlimited subscribers without worrying about list size pricing
You're a photographer, designer, creative brand, or visual-focused business seeking intuitive design tools

faq.a: Brevo is better for most use cases due to its feature breadth, free tier, and lower costs. However, Flodesk excels if you're a creative brand prioritizing design quality and unlimited subscriber scaling. The best choice depends on your specific needs and industry.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Brevo or Flodesk?
faq.a: Brevo is significantly cheaper, offering a free plan with 100,000 subscribers and paid plans starting at $25/month. Flodesk has no free tier and starts at $38/month, but includes unlimited subscribers at any plan level. For small lists, Brevo is cheaper; for large lists, Flodesk becomes competitive.

faq.q: Can I switch from Flodesk to Brevo?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support contact list exports and integrations with common tools. Most email marketing platforms allow you to export your subscriber list and import it into another service. Check each platform's documentation for specific export formats and migration steps.
